case_title: NATION'S ROOFING COMPANY VS MERIDIAN CONSTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY NATION'S ROOFING COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MERIDIAN CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NATION'S ROOFING COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERIDIAN CONSTRUCTION $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,539.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
